overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury penthouse or high-end lounge in a futuristic coastal city, beginning in a sunlit corridor with panoramic windows overlooking a beach and roller coaster, transitioning through interior lounge spaces, and descending to a derelict lower level with industrial views. The footage displays high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced lighting and detailed environmental storytelling characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.
